title: Clermont-Ferrand, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Clermont-Ferrand, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Clermont-Ferrand is a city in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes with a population of 145,000. A volcanic city in the heart of France, home to Michelin, with a striking black Gothic cathedral and stunning natural surroundings.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
